title: Real-Time Session Visualization UI/UX Design
consumer_purpose: Provide desktop users with a real-time animated visualization of all active coding sessions, showing what they're working on, which files they're touching, and an animated codebase heat map
claim_atoms: The design reuses the EXISTING /global/event SSE stream — no new backend endpoint needed
All renderer components are new — no existing patterns to extend for the viz overlay
Two topology options: in-window tab in SessionSidePanel OR separate BrowserWindow (loading-window pattern)
Backend changes: ONLY add coordination Bus events (task_status, path_claim, heartbeat) — no existing code modified
Visualization uses SVG DOM (not Canvas) for graph rendering — aligned with existing SVG-heavy codebase
No new IPC channels — viz overlay subscribes to the same SSE stream the renderer already consumes
content:
# Real-Time Session Visualization — Architecture & UI/UX Design (REVISED)

## Overview

A visualization overlay showing real-time activity of all active coding sessions. Three visualization surfaces:
1. **Codebase Map** — tree/force-directed graph of the repo with active files/sessions pulsing
2. **Session Activity Feed** — scrolling list of real-time events per session
3. **Session Status Indicators** — compact badges showing all active sessions

## Architecture (Revised)

### Key Insight: The SSE Stream Already Exists

The renderer **already connects** to `GET /global/event` on the sidecar and receives typed events through `ServerSDKProvider` (`packages/app/src/context/server-sdk.tsx`). The SSE stream already carries:
- `session.status`, `session.error` — session lifecycle
- `message.part.delta`, `message.part.updated` — streaming responses
- `file.edited`, `todo.updated`, `lsp.updated` — activity events
- `permission.asked`, `question.asked` — interactive events

**No new backend endpoint is needed.** The viz overlay subscribes to the same SSE stream, filtering for relevant event types.

### What's Missing (Small, Additive Backend Changes)

The SSE stream does NOT yet carry **coordination events** (task status, path claims, session heartbeats). These are recorded via `log_activity`, `task()`, `preflight_check()` but not published to Bus. The only backend work is:

1. Define 4 new Bus event types for coordination data
2. Wire publish calls in existing coordination tools

### Data Flow

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      SIDECAR (utilityProcess)                      │
│                                                                     │
│  Bus Service ──subscribeAll()──► /global/event (SSE, ALREADY EXISTS)│
│       ▲                                                                │
│       │ publishes                                                │
│  [40+ Bus event types]                                           │
│  + NEW: coordination.task_status                                 │
│  + NEW: coordination.path_claimed                                 │
│  + NEW: coordination.session_heartbeat                            │
│  + NEW: coordination.activity_logged                              │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           │ SSE over localhost
                           ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    MAIN WINDOW RENDERER (SolidJS)                   │
│                                                                     │
│  ServerSDKProvider (ALREADY EXISTS)                                  │
│    └─ event.listen() ← SSE stream                                  │
│         │                                                           │
│         ├──► Existing app state (sessions, messages, etc.)          │
│         │                                                           │
│         └──► NEW: SessionVizProvider                                │
│                filters session.*, coordination.* events              │
│                maintains reactive viz state                          │
│                │                                                     │
│                ├──► CodebaseMap (SVG, in new tab of SessionSidePanel)│
│                ├──► ActivityFeed (capped DOM list + streaming)       │
│                └──► SessionBadge (titlebar status indicators)        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Topology Options

| Option | Implementation | Trade-off |
|---|---|---|
| **In-window** — new tab in `SessionSidePanel` | Add "Viz" tab to `<Tabs.Trigger>` list in `session-side-panel.tsx` | Shares SSE subscription; constrained to existing layout grid; simplest path |
| **Floating window** — separate `BrowserWindow` | Follow `createLoadingWindow()` pattern in `windows.ts` | Fully independent; can live on second monitor; needs its own SolidJS entry + SSE subscription |
| **Fixed overlay** — floating panel pinned to viewport | Use `debug-bar.tsx` pattern: `.fixed bottom-3 right-3 z-50` | Always visible during any session; no window management overhead |

## UI/UX Design

### Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  OpenCode Desktop          [🟢 plan  🟡 exec  ⚪ build]   ⌘⇧V │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────┤
│                                                     │ Session  │
│              Main Chat Workspace                    │ SidePanel │
│                                                     │ ┌───────┐ │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │ │Review  │ │
│  │                                              │   │ ├───────┤ │
│  │           [user messages,                     │   │ │Context │ │
│  │            agent responses,                   │   │ ├───────┤ │
│  │            code diffs]                        │   │ │Files  │ │
│  │                                              │   │ ├───────┤ │
│  │                                              │   │ │✦ VIZ  │ │  ← NEW TAB
│  │                                              │   │ │       │ │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │ │📦core │ │
│                                                     │ │  ●●●●●│ │  ← pulsing = active
│                                                     │ │📦dsk │ │
│                                                     │ │  ●●   │ │
│                                                     │ │📦app │ │
│                                                     │ │  ●    │ │
│                                                     │ │📦ui  │ │
│                                                     │ │       │ │
│                                                     │ │────────│ │
│                                                     │ │ACTIVITY│ │
│                                                     │ │🛠 plan  │ │
│                                                     │ │  task:..│ │
│                                                     │ │📝 exec  │ │
│                                                     │ │  edit.. │ │
│                                                     │ │💬 build │ │
│                                                     │ │  msg..  │ │
│                                                     │ └───────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────┘
```

### Session Indicators (Titlebar Badges)

Small colored badges in the app titlebar area, showing active session status at a glance without opening the viz panel:

```
[ 🟢 plan — editing auth.ts ] [ 🟡 exec — waiting ] [ ⚪ build — idle ]
```

Each badge: session color dot + agent name + current action tooltip

### Codebase Map (Viz Tab)

- **Rendering**: SVG DOM (aligned with existing icon system, spinner, progress circle patterns)
- **Layout**: Simple tree layout (packages → subdirectories) — no force-directed graph initially. D3-force can be added later if needed.
- **Nodes**: Each package shown as a labeled rounded rectangle
- **Active indicators**: Pulsing CSS animation (existing `pulse-scale` `@keyframes`) on files being edited
- **Session correlation**: Color-coded dots on files — each session gets a unique color from a curated 12-color palette
- **Interaction**: Hover for tooltip showing which sessions are active there

### Activity Feed

- **Rendering**: Capped DOM list (last 50 events) with `contain: strict` for paint containment
- **Grouping**: By session, with expandable session headers
- **Event types with icons**: 🛠 tool call, 📝 file edit, 💬 assistant message, ⚡ permission request, 🔄 LLM turn
- **Timestamps**: Relative ("2s ago", "1m ago") with absolute on hover
- **Auto-scroll**: Scroll to bottom on new events, pause on manual scroll

## Implementation Phases

### Phase 1 — Event Pipeline (1-2 days)
1. Define 4 coordination Bus event types (`packages/opencode/src/coordination/coord-events.ts`)
2. Wire publish calls in coordination tools (task, preflight, log_activity)
3. Verify events appear in the existing `/global/event` SSE stream

### Phase 2 — In-Window Viz Tab (2-3 days)
4. Create `SessionVizProvider` context (filters SSE events for viz state)
5. Add "Viz" tab to `SessionSidePanel` tabs
6. Build `ActivityFeed` component (capped list, event types, timestamps)
7. Build `CodebaseMap` SVG component (package tree, active dots, CSS animations)
8. Wire provider → components

### Phase 3 — Status Badges (1-2 days)
9. Create `SessionBadge` component for titlebar
10. Integrate into layout header
11. Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+Shift+V)

### Phase 4 — Polish (2-3 days)
12. Animation performance — throttle SSE events, use `will-change`
13. Error states — connection lost, empty state
14. Accessibility — ARIA labels on map, keyboard navigation in feed
15. Preferences toggle — enable/disable in Settings

## File Changes (All Additive)

**New files:**
- `packages/opencode/src/coordination/coord-events.ts` (~60 lines)
- `packages/app/src/context/session-viz.tsx` (~120 lines)
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/codebase-map.tsx` (~200 lines)
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/activity-feed.tsx` (~150 lines)
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/session-badge.tsx` (~80 lines)
- `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/viz-panel.tsx` (~60 lines)
- `packages/app/src/utils/codebase-graph.ts` (~100 lines)

**Modified files:**
- `packages/opencode/src/coordination/index.ts` — export new events
- `packages/opencode/server/.../api.ts` — register new event types (if needed)
- `packages/app/src/pages/session/session-side-panel.tsx` — add Viz tab
- `packages/app/src/pages/layout.tsx` — add SessionBadge to header

**No existing code deleted or rewritten.**

## Dependencies Added
- `d3-force` (optional, for Phase 4 force-directed layout upgrade)
- `d3-scale` (optional, for color mapping)

## Total Effort
- **Phase 1**: 1-2 days
- **Phase 2**: 2-3 days
- **Phase 3**: 1-2 days
- **Phase 4**: 2-3 days
- **Total**: ~1-2 weeks for full implementation
revision_notes: Revised after subagent exploration: (1) Use existing /global/event SSE stream instead of creating new endpoint — renderer already consumes it. (2) Two topology options: in-window tab in SessionSidePanel or separate BrowserWindow. (3) SVG DOM rendering (not Canvas) — aligned with existing SVG-heavy codebase. (4) No new IPC channels — viz shares the SSE subscription. (5) CSS-only animations — no motion library.
